original_abstract:
The failure to fully realize state responsibility toward neglected children in Indonesia stems largely from the lack of institutionalized good governance and a deficit of genuine political will within the government. This study identifies several systemic constraints hindering the protection of children's rights, particularly those of "waifs" or abandoned youth. Key barriers include the inconsistent implementation of law enforcement, limited capacity of legal officials, and a lack of adequate supporting infrastructure. Furthermore, government programs often remain ineffective due to Indonesia’s broad economic challenges and low household income levels.

Societal factors also play a significant role, including a general lack of awareness among parents regarding children's rights and a broader misunderstanding of the provisions set forth by the International Convention on the Rights of the Child. These issues are exacerbated by poor coordination between social organizations and the government, as well as a lack of established cross-sectoral and international cooperation. To address these gaps, the study suggests that the government must move beyond symbolic gestures and integrate responsive, accountable governance into its operational framework to ensure the welfare of the nation's most vulnerable citizens.
humanized_abstract:
PENGGARAAN MANUSIA “NEGLECTED CHILDREN” DARI PERSPEKTIF NEGARA OLEH KHOMALI ADAM SYAH(ABSTRAKT) Tujuan penelitian ini untuk mencari jawaban tentang mengapa negara Indonesia tidak melakukan penggaraan hak asasi manusia dengan cara memberikan penanganan tertinggi terhadap anak terlantar? Menurut hasil analisis penelitian terdapat dua jawaban utama: terlebih pertama adalah kondisi badan negara yang tidak berada dalam keteladanagn institutional good governance serta tidak mendapat dukungan political will dari aparatus negara itu sendiri;dan yang kedua adalah penghalangan yang berada di dalam system negara Indonesia. Beberapa syariahtatmazuri dalam hal ini seperti cara pelaksanaan penertiban ataupun tugas belajar, pengetahuan ataupun kejuruan penyelidik berupa kurangnya SDM aparatur hukum, hingga adanya kesulitan fungsi maupun dari sistem penunjang di bawahnya;serta kemudian ekosistem pembangunan, terutama dampak ekonomi domestik negara seperti hasil akhir indikator KHH yang masih sangat meluap ditambahkan masih banyak rakyat Indonesia yang dihitung baru dapat mencukupi kebutuhan harian dengan perolehan pendapatan dari wilayah desa dan kota yang belum sempurna.

A significant number of factors at the societal level, including parents not being adequately informed on children's rights and not being aware of what has been promised by the Croatian government for children in the International Convention on the Rights of the Child, as well as a lack of coordination among social organizations and NGOs and a lack of inter-sectoral and international co-operation, were revealed in the study. The basis for the analysis of the gaps existing in the given social field is laid down in the recommendations for addressing the protection of children in Croatia; recommendations that address, in particular, the transformation of the government's communication on the children's rights and other activities with more than just purely declaratory character, and require the government to establish the principles of responsive and accountable governance for the protection of the most vulnerable members of our society.
